name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, lifeless output of typical AI tools.
problem: Most AI presentation tools generate visually bland, templated slides that require heavy manual cleanup before they're usable in professional settings. Chronicle 2.0 addresses this by combining AI content generation with design-aware formatting to produce presentations that actually look intentional. This saves teams significant time while maintaining the visual quality expected in client-facing or executive contexts.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks with consistent visual identity
Creating client-facing project proposals without a designer
Generating internal strategy presentations from rough notes
Producing sales enablement decks at scale across a team
